final_prompt.prompt:
Create a steampunk mechanical device illustration featuring intricate gears, pipes, and gauges (any in-image text in Chinese, if rendered).

Style/medium: needs a steampunk aesthetic with Victorian-era decorative elements — exact stylistic execution is yours
Composition: 
Subject: must include intricate gears, pipes, and gauges
Scene/backdrop: must include the mechanical device context
Lighting/mood: needs a precision-retro industrial atmosphere — exact light source mix is yours
Color palette: needs a brass and copper dominant direction — exact metallic tones and ratios are yours
Materials/textures: must include brass and copper surface treatment — exact grain / patina / weight is yours
Text (verbatim): 
Constraints: if any in-image text is rendered, default to Chinese
Avoid:
